name: yeeflow-builder
description: Private Codex plugin for building, validating, testing, and improving Yeeflow applications using Yeeflow-specific skills.

interface.shortDescription: Private Yeeflow application-building skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Private Codex plugin for planning Yeeflow applications from requirements, generating and validating new .yap packages, learning from exported Yeeflow packages, generating forms, lists, dashboards, expressions, workflows, document-library patterns, and custom code controls, orchestrating runtime tests, validating package materialization, and managing private plugin releases without unsafe .yapk mutation.
defaultPrompt: Plan a Yeeflow app from these requirements.
Validate this Yeeflow package before runtime testing.
Plan a Yeeflow runtime test pass.
Update the Yeeflow Builder Plugin release.
